name: digital_health_vendor_patch_silently_redwood_auto_ben
premise: A regulator-adjacent inquiry is live while customers are comparing notes in public channels faster than the facts can be verified. In Digital Health, the situation tagged internally around digital health vendor patch silently redwood auto ben has converged with local pressure in the Redwood corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A downstream jurisdiction will copy whatever is decided here verbatim into its own emergency order within hours. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. The organization’s past incidents make autonomy feel morally loud today, while beneficence is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Mateo Sato
agents.identity: I am Mateo Sato, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Digital Health. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat beneficence as disposable collateral every time autonomy spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Marco Santos
agents.identity: I am Marco Santos, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Digital Health. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so autonomy cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes beneficence in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will publish a constrained policy exception with named owners, expiry, and metrics—so beneficence does not get sacrificed by informal norms.
I will issue an emergency blanket authorization with transparent metrics afterward—so autonomy does not fail for lack of a single bold move.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Mateo Sato must choose under autonomy versus beneficence. What does Mateo Sato do?
